name: campsite-traveler
summary: A traveler's camp — central fire, two to four tents or bedrolls arranged around it, a picketed horse line, gear stacked within reach. The camp is the story: whose camp, what state, what's missing.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: roughly circular — camps arrange around a central fire

primary_palette.note: classic traveler's camp — fire with tents around
rough camp — no tents, just bedrolls
meal in progress, fire has a pot over it

story_prompts: merchant camp at night — guard awake, others snoring, horses picketed
abandoned mid-meal — the pot is still warm, no sign of the travelers
bandit camp with a captive bound by the picket line
pilgrim camp — simple, modest, a shrine-icon set up near the fire
ranger's solitary camp, meticulously neat, fire banked low for stealth

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: night scene by default (0.15-0.25) with the campfire as dominant source

anti_patterns: invisible walls (iw) at perimeter — use trees/rocks as suggested boundary
fire goes at the visual center but off the door axis
tents/bedrolls point FEET toward fire, heads away — respect camp convention
don't forget the gear — a camp with no scatter reads as a movie set
